statement.en: The evaluation of kinetic and static perimetry practice in neuro-ophthalmology

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: This is a clinical/medical review article (neuro-ophthalmology perimetry methods) categorized under cs.AI, likely provisionally posted or under validation. The content compares established diagnostic techniques (kinetic vs static perimetry) rather than proposing novel axioms. Classification as FLOWING reflects: (1) preprint status typical of 2026-dated submissions, (2) empirical medical evaluation not yet peer-validated, (3) categorical misalignment (medical content in cs.AI suggests provisional metadata).

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 視野の境界は、知覚と閾値の出会いの特異点として存在する。
